title: Forever World+
description: A new take on making vanilla+ modpacks, making them a little less... vanilla.
body:
# A Modpack suitable for a ''Forever World''
## This modpack adds:
- 50+ New Structures
- 50+ New Mobs
- Bosses
- Greatly Enhanced End And Nether
- 2 New Dimensions
- Skill Tree
- Better Vanilla Structures
- A New Fresh Look To All The Mobs
- Cute Hamsters
- Furniture
- Industrial Mod
- Stunning Visuals With Good Performance
- A Lot Of New Armors, Weapons and Loot
- Enhanced Game Overall
- Goblins (my favourite part)
- And Much More...

![A Brand New Adventure Awaits...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f87e105141d7a438b30f0d0cede997ca4f763bc6.jpeg)

## Check Photos 
So you can see more

When opening the game if background is bugged press ( control + alt + r )

Check resource packs if something looks off

### Follow me on Twitch, TikTok and Youtube: korus_777
